arts.ttl: Leandro Trossard makes Bukayo Saka Arsenal feelings clear with hilarious moment before PSG clash
arts.sum: For Arsenal to get anything out of their upcoming Champions League clash against Paris Saint-Germain, the duo will have to be at their very best. Following his arrival in January 2023, Trossard made quite the impact, with 11 goal contributions arriving in his first 20 Premier League games for the club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Paris Saint-Germain – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League this week in a glamour tie at the Emirates. The North Londoners are looking for their first win of the league phase after a goalless draw at Atalanta on matchday one, while Paris Saint-Germain are seeking back-to-back wins after a narrow 1-0 win over Girona last […] The post Arsenal vs Paris Saint-Germain – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ben White facing fight for Arsenal future as Riccardo Calafiori draws Mikel Arteta's eye
arts.sum: Ben White has seen Riccardo Calafiori impress in his place at right-back, with Mikel Arteta seemingly facing a huge call over the Englishman's future at Arsenal

arts.ttl: PSG have EXILED a £43m star and already believe Bradley Barcola is the 'new Kylian Mbappe' to lead their new youthful team to glory: Here's why the French champions are a danger to Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Surprisingly, divested of their last true superstar, they now look better. PSG are unbeaten at the top of Ligue 1, scoring freely, and solid at the back. Mbappe rarely turned up for a defensive shift.

arts.ttl: TMW: Ultras Investigation – Inzaghi, Calabria, and Skriniar face potential suspension
arts.sum: In a significant development following the recent police operation that led to 19 arrests of Inter and AC Milan ultras leaders, new details have emerged that could have serious implications for some players and staff of both clubs. While not currently under investigation, certain club members may face consequences due to their interactions with ultras groups. TMW report that the Federal Prosecutor’s Office has requested investigation files from Milan prosecutors to examine the conduct of club members in relation to ultras. arts.ttl: Recent €20million PSG signing remains on Chelsea’s radar
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain may only have recently signed Lucas Beraldo, but he’s a player who remains on the radar of Chelsea, according to Blues journalist Simon Phillips via his Substack. arts.sum: Arsenal have been lauded for their success from set-pieces since the arrival of Nicolas Jover, but L'Equipe claim to have uncovered their methods.
